extraction.one_line_summary: WOODS Michael caught JORGENSON Matteo in final meters of Puy de Dôme while POGAČAR Tadej distanced VINGEGAARD Jonas by 8 seconds in GC battle.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR attacked with 1km remaining, using explosive accelerations to test VINGEGAARD who could only respond at steady tempo.
VINGEGAARD looked back for KUSS Sepp when losing POGAČAR's wheel, revealing team dependence under maximum pressure.
JORGENSON Matteo bridged to early break with POWLESS Neilson, both Americans showing coordinated aggressive positioning before mountain stages.
CAMPENAERTS Victor struggled on pre-sprint Cat 4 climb despite being in 14-rider break, signaling vulnerability on undulating terrain.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: gained 8 seconds on VINGEGAARD with 1km attack, using repeated accelerations on steepest gradients to break yellow jersey's rhythm
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: grimaced visibly under POGAČAR's accelerations, unprecedented pain display suggests nearing his limit on explosive steep gradients
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: caught JORGENSON from behind in final meters at age 36, exceptional late-climb surge ability
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: neutral: VINGEGAARD searched for him when losing wheel, positioned ninth overall but unable to assist in critical moment
rider_signals.JORGENSON Matteo: positive: made 14-rider break and held lead until final meters, strong climbing from young American
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: positive: attacked from gun with JORGENSON into 14-rider break, tactical polka dot jersey defense securing 4 points pre-finale
rider_signals.CAMPENAERTS Victor: negative: visibly suffering on Cat 4 climb to intermediate sprint despite being in early break
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: neutral: took Cat 4 point despite irrelevance to green jersey, opportunistic point collection habit
rider_signals.CALMEJANE Lilian: negative: crashed due to spectator barrier flags mid-stage, lost contact with peloton
rider_signals.ABRAHAMSEN Jonas: neutral: won intermediate sprint from 14-rider break
